text: The guard moves his armored fist to strike you unconscious, another worthy challenger you think to yourself. As you ready your determination, concussions, and 47 injuries the guard lands a blow upon your noggin. You black out.………When you next awake it’s in the village jail, apparently attempted theft is crime in this strange village. As you pass the time on your 30 year sentence you can’t help but think about what you could’ve done differently. Congratulations You Have Found The Convict Ending [New Game]
